nav.grundpflege_desc: Washing, dressing, oral care and positioning – dignified and gentle, tailored to your rhythm.
nav.behandlung_desc: Medication administration, wound care, injections and other prescribed measures.
nav.hauswirtschaft_desc: Shopping, cooking, cleaning and laundry – so you feel at home.
nav.begleitung_desc: Doctor visits, walks, conversations – we are there for you.
nav.demenz_desc: Empathetic support and structured daily routines for people with dementia.
nav.palliativ_desc: Dignified end-of-life care – for quality of life and family support.

hero.headline: Professional care that touches.
hero.subline: We accompany you and your loved ones with expertise, empathy and heart – so you are well cared for in familiar surroundings.

booking.headline: Your first step – free & non-binding.
booking.subline: Choose the type of conversation that suits you.
booking.info_desc: Ask your questions – free and without obligation.
booking.eval_desc: Together we determine your care needs.
booking.visit_desc: We come to you for a personal evaluation.
booking.success_desc: We look forward to speaking with you. Please check your inbox.

services.headline: Care that adapts – not the other way around.
services.subline: Every person is unique. That's why we tailor our care services individually and flexibly.

footer.tagline: Outpatient care that grows with you – professional, caring and reliable.
